Banking Host Remediation Process Added
The
Interac
e-Transfer Banking Host Remediation Process chapter provides guidance to financial institutions and their banking hosts. It addresses what to expect of the remediation process when errors occur during the receiving, sending, or cancellation stages of a transaction.

Limits, Settlement, Tracing, and Reports Part
Chapter 6,
Interac
e-Transfer Banking Host Remediation Process
New chapter added to provide an overview of the banking host remediation process and address common errors that occur during the receiving, sending, and cancellation stages of a transaction.
